transformation_codes.callback: Rust closure invoked through a contained callback trampoline
transformation_codes.inferred: inferred by a tightly packed convenience wrapper
transformation_codes.internal: allocated, initialized, or validated inside the safe wrapper
transformation_codes.owned: validated and copied, derived, or reconstructed in owned native storage
transformation_codes.pass: validated value or caller-owned slice passed through the reviewed raw ABI
